# REQ-SYS-045: Camera ECU shall detect faded lane markings at > 80% confidence

## ASIL Level
B

## Description
Camera ECU shall detect faded lane markings at > 80% confidence.

## Rationale
ISO 26262-3:2018, clause 5-7.4.2 — safety goal SG-LA-01 requires timely functional safety response.

## Verification Method
Back-to-back test comparing sensor input vs. actuator output.

## Traceability
- Up: None
- Down: None
